title: Free Specialty Coffee
description: Redeem for a signature drink and turn a routine stop into a highlight. A simple reward that builds daily frequency and loyalty.

title: Reusable Cup
description: A branded cup reward that travels with your customer and markets your brand. Pair it with double-points days to accelerate repeat visits.

title: Coffee Bean Bag
description: Take home a premium bag of beans and keep your cafe top of mind at home. Ideal as a higher-tier redemption for engaged members.

title: Free Pastry
description: A sweet win that drives pairing behavior and higher tickets. Use it as a midday nudge when traffic dips.

title: Drink of the Week
description: Barista pick redemption that keeps the program feeling new every week. Great for introducing seasonal flavors and limited drops.

title: Double Points Token
description: Activate a personal double-points day to boost frequency without discounting prices. Members love choosing when to use it.
